title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS trusted by The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics skills, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with demonstrated expertise in Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, and GTM scaling directly matches Finout's need for a hands-on Head of RevOps. The Tel Aviv/NY hybrid role aligns perfectly with his location preferences and the fintech/cloud infrastructure domain is a natural extension of his B2B SaaS foundation.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps role and your profile immediately stood out—your depth in scaling GTM operations within high-growth B2B SaaS aligns exceptionally well with what they're building. They're looking for someone to architect the operational backbone for a company trusted by The New York Times and Wiz, and your hands-on Salesforce and revenue analytics expertise, combined with your familiarity with the Tel Aviv tech scene, positions you uniquely for this CRO-reporting role.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, is hiring a RevOps Manager to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. The role partners with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions, analyze performance data, and support GTM planning cycles. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation strategies, strong analytical skills with Excel/SQL/BI tools (Tableau, Retool), Salesforce proficiency, and experience with territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan.
score_reason: Perfect alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce/analytics skill set. Territory strategy and GTM optimization are core RevOps competencies, and Gong's revenue intelligence platform directly matches his CAC/LTV and pipeline forecasting strengths.
ai_opener: Omri, your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS RevOps caught my attention for Gong's Territory Strategy & Operations role. With your track record optimizing GTM models and Salesforce proficiency, you'd be the perfect fit to redesign Gong's global territory architecture—especially given how territory composition directly impacts the revenue intelligence insights Gong provides. I'd love to explore how your experience with pipeline forecasting and segmentation strategies could accelerate Gong's go-to-market execution.

title: Senior Manager, Revenue Operations
description: Eve, a legal tech company offering AI-driven solutions for plaintiff attorneys, seeks a Senior Manager of Revenue Operations to find and plug revenue leaks across the GTM motion. Requires 8–10+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or GTM Operations at high-growth B2B SaaS with 3–5 years of people leadership. Candidates should have hypergrowth experience, end-to-end rollout track record, an AI-native operating posture, and a bias toward decisive action, owning measurable revenue outcomes like speed-to-lead and pipeline conversion.

The remote role, legal tech verticalization, and emphasis on pipeline conversion and measurable revenue outcomes play directly to his core strengths.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15 years building RevOps engines at high-growth B2B SaaS companies, and Eve's mission to democratize legal tech for plaintiff attorneys caught my attention. Your focus on finding and plugging revenue leaks mirrors exactly the GTM diagnostics I've done repeatedly: I've led end-to-end Salesforce/HubSpot rollouts, optimized speed-to-lead mechanics, and scaled pipeline conversion in hypergrowth environments. I'd love to explore how my track record owning measurable revenue outcomes could help you accelerate Eve's GTM motion.

title: Sales Strategy & Operations Manager
description: Eve seeks an early RevOps hire to ensure its sales team operates at peak efficiency. You'll own systems, processes, and insights that help AEs move faster and stay compliant with GTM processes, partnering with Sales, Finance, and Marketing. Requires 4–7 years in Sales Operations, Revenue Operations, or Enablement at a SaaS company, deep B2B sales motion understanding, admin-level HubSpot or Salesforce fluency, and comfort with Outreach, Gong, and ZoomInfo. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM motions and deep fluency in Salesforce/HubSpot + tools like Outreach and Gong, I'm curious whether you'd benefit from someone who can architect systems and processes that scale beyond the early-stage phase.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems

As the first dedicated RevOps hire for the division, you'll architect the GTM engine from scratch—Salesforce configuration, pipeline management, routing, reporting, and the full revenue tech stack. Requires 5+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops with 2 years senior capacity, deep Salesforce expertise, and familiarity with GTM systems like Outreach, LeanData, Clay, and HubSpot.
